headline: BlackRock Liquidity Probe in Private Credit Might Change The Case For Investing In BlackRock (BLK)
summary: Pomerantz LLP has begun investigating BlackRock over potential securities fraud and other unlawful practices after the firm restricted withdrawals from its HPS Corporate Lending Fund when redemption requests breached its 5% liquidity threshold, raising fresh questions about how it manages liquidity in private credit vehicles. This episode puts a spotlight on BlackRock’s growing alternatives platform and the governance, risk controls, and transparency required when investors are locked into...

headline: New Bill Moves To Restore Thousands Of Social Security Jobs After Trump Cuts Left Americans Waiting Hours For Help
summary: Michigan Rep. Haley Stevens introduces legislation to restore SSA staffing after Trump-era cuts worsened service and deepened a looming solvency crisis.

raw.headline: New Bill Moves To Restore Thousands Of Social Security Jobs After Trump Cuts Left Americans Waiting Hours For Help

headline: BlackRock Balances Quantum Computing Bet With Bearish German Bond Views
summary: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) has made a major investment in IQM Quantum Computers, expanding its exposure to quantum computing. The firm has also increased bearish positions on German government bonds via its €6.5b Tactical Opportunities Fund. These moves indicate a broader focus on advanced technology and changing views on European inflation and fiscal policy. For you as an investor, these developments show how a large asset manager is allocating capital across very different themes, from quantum...

headline: Blue Owl Slams Brakes on Redemptions at Two Funds as Private Credit Worries Mount
summary: Investors asked to yank 21.9% from Blue Owl’s $20 billion Credit Income Corp. fund between January and March.
